title: Kits & Crates +
description: GUI-first Kits + Animated Crates ‚ÄĘ Chance-based rewards ‚ÄĘ Optional reward actions (commands/sounds/particles)
body:
# Kits & Crates + **GUI-first Kits + Animated Crates ‚ÄĘ Chance-based rewards ‚ÄĘ Optional reward actions (commands/sounds/particles)**

CLICK HERE FOR FULL GUIDE & WIKI

 Native: 1.21 ‚ÄĘ Tested: 1.21‚Äď26.1.2 ‚ÄĘ Author: Duq_ ‚ÄĘ Test Server: mcwar.co DISCORD LINK FOR ALL DISCUSSION & QUESTIONS ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6e3470cefdad2ad3522048ca61d11fc9dd3e8dd_0.webp) ## Features‚Äč > **Kits & Crates + is a modern, in-game editor for building kits and reward crates without living in config files. > Create loadouts, build crate reward pools, and control exactly how rewards are delivered ‚ÄĒ including optional ‚Äúreward actions‚ÄĚ like commands, sounds, and particles. > Built for fast iteration, clean menus, and modern 1.21.x servers.** > **Layered % Chance Crate Creation!** > > ![Layered Crates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc1b4218843ab235f962c1bca0f5798c24cc5a64.gif) > **Customizable Crate Open Effects!** > > ![Crate Effects!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03fb2b7a39cb51fa6126cfaeae6190ed35070c5a.gif) > **Slot Specific Layered Kits!** > > ![Kits Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ff5d87c6fdc9fa46f1b4a885de67f4f925244c.gif) ‚Äč # **Highlights**‚Äč - ‚úĒ GUI-first workflow ‚ÄĒ create/edit kits & crates in-game - ‚úĒ Animated crate openings with protected sessions (no accidental interruption mid-animation) - ‚úĒ Chance-based reward pools per entry (% chances) - ‚úĒ Reward Actions (optional) ‚ÄĒ run commands, play sounds, spawn particles - ‚úĒ Polished editor UX ‚ÄĒ clear icons & indicators for what each reward contains - ‚úĒ 1.21.x focused ‚ÄĒ designed for modern Paper/Spigot servers # **Core Features**‚Äč ## Kits - Create kits with items (weapons, armor, tools, custom items, etc.) - Set display name/icon, organize kits cleanly - Optional permission gating per kit ## Crates - Create crate reward pools with % chances - Animated opening flow for a ‚Äúpremium‚ÄĚ feel - Optional reward actions per reward entry (commands/sounds/particles) ## Editor Polish - GUI indicators so admins can see what‚Äôs attached to a reward at a glance - Designed for quick iteration: edit ‚Üí test ‚Üí adjust ## Quick Start‚Äč - Drop the jar into /plugins and restart. - Open the editor menu. - Create a Kit (add items, set a name/icon). - Create a Crate (add rewards, set chances, add optional actions). - Test open a crate and verify animation + payouts. Commands & Permissions Moved to the [Documentation](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/kits-crates.131789/)‚Äč > Spoiler: FAQ / Notes > > Support > [DISCORD LINK](https://discord.gg/eXU4YP94u3) > FOR ALL DISCUSSION & QUESTIONS > If something breaks, > include: > ‚ÄĘ server version (Paper/Spigot + build) ‚ÄĘ plugin version ‚ÄĘ steps to reproduce ‚ÄĘ console errors. > You can also preview behavior on: mcwar.co > > Kits & Crates + ‚ÄĘ by Duq_
